RuleSet.Name: src/schemapubobj/IPubObj.java
RuleSet.GenRule: $switch IsPublic yes reallyFileIPubObjJava default empty$

GenFile.Name: reallyFileIPubObjJava
GenFile.BasePackageName: $reference ManufacturingSchema lower JavaPackage$.$reference ManufacturingSchema lower SchemaName$pub/src/main/java
GenFile.SubPackageName: $reference ManufacturingSchema lower JavaPackage$.$reference ManufacturingSchema lower SchemaName$pubobj

RuleSet.GenRule: $switch HasSuperClassRelation yes empty default declIPubObjGetClassCode$$switch HasSuperClassRelation yes empty default declIPubObjRealise$$switch HasSuperClassRelation yes empty default declIPubObjForget$$switch HasSuperClassRelation yes empty default declIPubObjRead$$switch ThisHasChain yes declIPubObjMoveUp default empty$$switch ThisHasChain yes declIPubObjMoveDown default empty$$switch HasSuperClassRelation yes empty default declIPubObjBeginEdit$$switch HasSuperClassRelation yes empty default declIPubObjEndEdit$$switch HasSuperClassRelation yes empty default declIPubObjEditAccessors$$declIPubObjEditAsAccessors$$declIPubObjTableAccessors$$switch HasSuperClassRelation no declIPubObjSchemaAccessors default empty$$switch HasSuperClassRelation no declIPubObjRecAccessors default empty$$declIPubObjTableRecAccessors$$switch HasDefSchemaOrSuper no declIPubObjPKeyAccessors default empty$$switch HasSuperClassRelation no declIPubObjIsNewAccessors default empty$$iterate Relation( each declIPubObjRelationAccessors empty empty )$$iterate Columns( each declIPubObjColumnAccessors empty empty )$$switch HasSuperClassRelation yes empty default declIPubObjCopyPKeyToRec$$switch HasSuperClassRelation yes empty default declIPubObjCopyRecToPKey$$iterate ServerMethods( each declPubJavaObjServerMethod empty empty )$$JavaObjInterface$
extends I$reference SchemaDef SchemaName$Pub$TableName$Obj$poptop Table switch HasSuperClassRelation yes alsoIPubObjInheritSuperClass default empty$
, I$reference SuperClassRelation reference ToTable SchemaName$Pub$reference SuperClassRelation reference ToTable TableName$Obj
, I$reference SchemaDef SchemaName$Pub$TableName$Obj
$switch HasSuperClassRelation yes declIPubObjInheritSuperClass default MaybeExtendPubICFLibAnyObj$
extends I$reference SuperClassRelation reference ToTable DefSchemaName$Pub$reference SuperClassRelation reference ToTable TableName$Obj
$switch IsInstanceMethod yes declPubJavaObjInstServerProc default empty$
boolean $leadlower Name$($iterate Params( first declServerMethodParamNoComma each declServerMethodParam empty empty )$ );
$switch IsInstanceMethod yes declPubJavaObjInstServerObjFunc default empty$
I$DefSchemaName$Pub$reference RetTable Name$Obj $leadlower Name$($iterate Params( first declServerMethodParamNoComma each declServerMethodParam empty empty )$ );
$switch IsInstanceMethod yes declPubJavaObjInstServerListFunc default empty$
List<I$DefSchemaName$Pub$reference RetTable Name$Obj> $leadlower Name$($iterate Params( first declServerMethodParamNoComma each declServerMethodParam empty empty )$ );

/** * Initially, the class code for an object is I$DefSchemaName$Pub$TableName$.CLASS_CODE, but the Obj layer relies on class code translation to map those * backing store entities to a runtime set of front-facing classcodes that the clients download and use when talking to the server implementing this code base. * * @return The runtime class code used by this object. Only after the system is fully booted are these values stable and reliable. */ int getClassCode();$switch HasAuditColumns yes declIPubObjGetAuditColumns default empty$
import server.markhome.mcf.v3_1.cfcore.MssCF.*;
$ExtendPubICFLibAnyObj$
extends ICFLibAnyObj

/** * Is this a new instance? * * @return True if this is a new instance, otherwise false if it has * been read, locked, or created. */ boolean getIsNew(); /** * Indicate whether this is a new instance. *

* This method should only be used by implementation internals. * * @param True if this is a new instance, otherwise false. */ void setIsNew( boolean value );

/** * Get the I$DefSchemaName$PubSchemaObj schema cache which manages this instance. * * @return I$DefSchemaName$PubSchemaObj schema cache which manages this instance. */ I$DefSchemaName$PubSchemaObj getSchema();
/** * Set the I$DefSchemaName$PubSchemaObj schema cache which manages this instance. * Should only be used to install overloads of the buff implementation wired specifically to a transport implementation * that eventually hits a server running a JPA backend. * * @param schema I$DefSchemaName$PubSchemaObj schema cache which manages this instance. */ void setSchema(I$DefSchemaName$PubSchemaObj schema);
$switch IsPublic yes reallyDeclIPubObjRelationAccessors default empty$
$switch RelationToIndexIsUnique yes maybeDeclIPubObjRelationSingletonAccessors default maybeDeclIPubObjRelationCollectionAccessors$
$switch RelationTypeTag Superclass empty default declIPubObjRelationSingletonAccessors$
$switch RelationTypeTag Superclass empty default declIPubObjRelationCollectionAccessors$
$switch InSuperiorRelation yes declIPubObjColumnGetter default declIPubObjColumnGetter$
$switch ColumnInPrimaryIndex yes declIPubObjColumnBasePKeyGetter default declIPubObjColumnBaseDataGetter$

$switch ColumnInPrimaryIndex yes declIPubObjColumnBasePKeyGetter default declIPubObjColumnBaseDataGetter$$switch ColumnInPrimaryIndex yes declIPubObjColumnBasePKeySetter default declIPubObjColumnBaseDataSetter$
$switch InSuperiorRelation yes declIPubObjColumnGetter default declIPubObjColumnGetter$
$switch ColumnInPrimaryIndex yes declIPubObjColumnBasePKeyGetter default declIPubObjColumnBaseDataGetter$

$switch ColumnInPrimaryIndex yes declIPubObjColumnBasePKeyGetter default declIPubObjColumnBaseDataGetter$$switch ColumnInPrimaryIndex yes declIPubObjColumnBasePKeySetter default declIPubObjColumnBaseDataSetter$

/** * Get the primary key of this instance. * * @return $IPubCompactedPrimaryIndexClass$ primary key for this instance. */ $IPubCompactedPrimaryIndexClass$ getPKey(); /** * Set the primary key of this instance. *

* This method should only be invoked by implementation internals. * * @param $IPubCompactedPrimaryIndexClass$ primary key value for this instance. */ void setPKey( $IPubCompactedPrimaryIndexClass$ value );

/** * create() may return a different instance than the * one used to invoke the operation. All future references * should be to the returned instance, not the original * invoker. You should lose all references to the original * invoker. * * @return I$reference BaseClass DefSchemaName$Pub$reference BaseClass TableName$Obj the reference to the created and realised instance. */ I$reference BaseClass DefSchemaName$Pub$reference BaseClass TableName$Obj create();

/** * Get the I$DefSchemaName$Pub$TableName$ instance which currently backs this instance. *

* This value will change for read-only instances, so you should * not hold on to the value as a reference anywhere outside the current call stack. * * @return I$DefSchemaName$Pub$TableName$ instance which currently backs this object. */ I$DefSchemaName$Pub$TableName$ get$TableName$Rec();
